🔮螢光礦物圖鑑：印度犬牙方解石✨
礦物的螢光強度分為輕度、中度、重度、印度。
這顆當然是印度等級。
更扯的是，關燈之後它還會自己發光...
（產地：印度）
（感謝礦物提供：晶鎮水晶 @tdemgox ）
 🔮 Fluorescent Mineral: Indian Dogtooth Calcite ✨ 
Fluorescence intensity is often mild, medium, strong… or “India level.” 
This one? Definitely India level ⚡ 
And here’s the crazy part: even after switching off the UV lamp, it keeps glowing on its own! 
(Origin: India) 
(Thanks to @tdemgox)  #星期天的螢光礦物圖鑑

text:
🔮螢光礦物圖鑑：奧地利白鎢礦✨
一顆礦物，竟然同時擁有兩種螢光反應？！

長波紫外線下，卻又切換成星空模式
這還真是不可思議。
（產地：奧地利Mittersill,Salzburg）
（感謝礦物提供：狸狸礦坑｜礦物 水晶 原礦） @kitsune_crystal 
 🔮Fluorescent Mineral: Austrian Scheelite ✨ 
One stone, two different UV reactions?! 
Under shortwave UV, it shows striking parallel blue bands. 
Under longwave UV, it shifts into a starry-sky glow 🌌 
(Origin: Mittersill, Salzburg, Austria) 
(Thanks to @kitsune_crystal)

 🔮Fluorescent Mineral : Spanish Yellow Fluorite ✨ 
Golden like crystallized honey under daylight— 
but switch on UV, and it shines purple-gold with layered color bands. 
When there are more than five layers, mineralogists call it “Crystal Level Five.” 
(Origin: Spain) 
(Thanks to @hm.minerals)
